mapper.sql: swsf.income_period, swsf.work_card, swsf.name, swsf.employee_category, swsf.division_contract_flag, swsf.department, swsf.administrative_office, swsf.team, swsf.station, swsf.bank_account, swsf.bank_name, swsf.post_skill_salary, swsf.target_performance_pay, swsf.allocate_performance_pay, swsf.wages_payable_post, swsf.wages_payable_float, swsf.wages_payable, swsf.overtime_pay, swsf.net_payment_post, swsf.net_payment_float, swsf.deduction_amount, swsf.net_payment, swsf.one_child_subsidy, swsf.safety_accumulation_award, swsf.seniority_allowance, swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, swsf.transportation_allowance, swsf.post_subsidy, swsf.allowance_deduction, swsf.deduct_medical_costs, swsf.deduct_other, swsf.type, swsf.cost_center, swsf.cost_center_num, swsf.production_factor, swsf.quality_factor, swsf.assessment_coefficient, swsf.service_department, swsf.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, swsf.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, swsf.deduct_hydropower_house, swsf.deduct_income_tax, swsf.personal_deductibles, swsf.company_deductibles, swsf.id, swsf.create_time, swsf.create_by, swsf.update_time, swsf.update_by, swsf.id_number, swsf.sub_base_pay, swsf.sub_post_skill_salary, swsf.sub_lump_sum_wage, swsf.deduct_other_before

swsf.income_period, swsf.work_card, swsf.name, swsf.employee_category, swsf.division_contract_flag, swsf.department, swsf.administrative_office, swsf.team, swsf.station, swsf.bank_account, swsf.bank_name, swsf.post_skill_salary, swsf.target_performance_pay, swsf.allocate_performance_pay, swsf.wages_payable_post, swsf.wages_payable_float, swsf.wages_payable, swsf.overtime_pay, swsf.net_payment_post, swsf.net_payment_float, swsf.deduction_amount, swsf.net_payment, swsf.one_child_subsidy, swsf.safety_accumulation_award, swsf.seniority_allowance, swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, swsf.transportation_allowance, swsf.post_subsidy, swsf.allowance_deduction, swsf.deduct_medical_costs, swsf.deduct_other, swsf.cost_center, swsf.cost_center_num, swsf.production_factor, swsf.quality_factor, swsf.assessment_coefficient, swsf.service_department, swsf.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, swsf.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, swsf.deduct_hydropower_house, swsf.deduct_income_tax, swsf.personal_deductibles, swsf.company_deductibles, swsf.id_number, swsf.sub_base_pay, swsf.sub_post_skill_salary, swsf.sub_lump_sum_wage, swsf.deduct_other_before

${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.employee_category as ${tAlias}_employee_category, ${tAlias}.division_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_division_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.department as ${tAlias}_department, ${tAlias}.administrative_office as ${tAlias}_administrative_office, ${tAlias}.team as ${tAlias}_team, ${tAlias}.station as ${tAlias}_station, ${tAlias}.bank_account as ${tAlias}_bank_account, ${tAlias}.bank_name as ${tAlias}_bank_name, ${tAlias}.post_skill_salary as ${tAlias}_post_skill_salary, ${tAlias}.target_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_target_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.allocate_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_allocate_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.wages_payable_post as ${tAlias}_wages_payable_post, ${tAlias}.wages_payable_float as ${tAlias}_wages_payable_float, ${tAlias}.wages_payable as ${tAlias}_wages_payable, ${tAlias}.overtime_pay as ${tAlias}_overtime_pay, ${tAlias}.net_payment_post as ${tAlias}_net_payment_post, ${tAlias}.net_payment_float as ${tAlias}_net_payment_float, ${tAlias}.deduction_amount as ${tAlias}_deduction_amount, ${tAlias}.net_payment as ${tAlias}_net_payment, ${tAlias}.one_child_subsidy as ${tAlias}_one_child_subsidy, ${tAlias}.safety_accumulation_award as ${tAlias}_safety_accumulation_award, ${tAlias}.seniority_allowance as ${tAlias}_seniority_allowance, ${tAlias}.high_temperature_subsidy as ${tAlias}_high_temperature_subsidy, ${tAlias}.transportation_allowance as ${tAlias}_transportation_allowance, ${tAlias}.post_subsidy as ${tAlias}_post_subsidy, ${tAlias}.allowance_deduction as ${tAlias}_allowance_deduction, ${tAlias}.deduct_medical_costs as ${tAlias}_deduct_medical_costs, ${tAlias}.deduct_other as ${tAlias}_deduct_other, ${tAlias}.type as ${tAlias}_type, ${tAlias}.cost_center as ${tAlias}_cost_center, ${tAlias}.cost_center_num as ${tAlias}_cost_center_num, ${tAlias}.production_factor as ${tAlias}_production_factor, ${tAlias}.quality_factor as ${tAlias}_quality_factor, ${tAlias}.assessment_coefficient as ${tAlias}_assessment_coefficient, ${tAlias}.service_department as ${tAlias}_service_department, ${tAlias}.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.company_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_company_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.deduct_hydropower_house as ${tAlias}_deduct_hydropower_house, ${tAlias}.deduct_income_tax as ${tAlias}_deduct_income_tax, ${tAlias}.personal_deductibles as ${tAlias}_personal_deductibles, ${tAlias}.company_deductibles as ${tAlias}_company_deductibles, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.id_number as ${tAlias}_id_number, ${tAlias}.sub_base_pay as ${tAlias}_sub_base_pay, ${tAlias}.sub_post_skill_salary as ${tAlias}_sub_post_skill_salary, ${tAlias}.sub_lump_sum_wage as ${tAlias}_sub_lump_sum_wage, ${tAlias}.deduct_other_before as ${tAlias}_deduct_other_before
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_wage_summary_file (income_period, work_card, name, employee_category, division_contract_flag, department, administrative_office, team, station, bank_account, bank_name, post_skill_salary, target_performance_pay, allocate_performance_pay, wages_payable_post, wages_payable_float, wages_payable, overtime_pay, net_payment_post, net_payment_float, deduction_amount, net_payment, one_child_subsidy, safety_accumulation_award, seniority_allowance, high_temperature_subsidy, transportation_allowance, post_subsidy, allowance_deduction, deduct_medical_costs, deduct_other, type, cost_center, cost_center_num, production_factor, quality_factor, assessment_coefficient, service_department, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, deduct_hydropower_house, deduct_income_tax, personal_deductibles, company_deductibles, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, id_number, sub_base_pay, sub_post_skill_salary,sub_lump_sum_wage, deduct_other_before ) values (#{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{allocatePerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{wagesPayablePost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{wagesPayableFloat,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{wagesPayable,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{overtimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{netPaymentPost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{netPaymentFloat,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductionAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{netPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{allowanceDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductMedicalCosts,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductOther,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{assessmentCoefficient,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductHydropowerHouse,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{idNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{subBasePay, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subPostSkillSalary, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{subLumpSumWage, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{deductOtherBefore, jdbcType = DECIMAL}
)
mapper.update:
update swm_wage_summary_file set income_period = #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_category = #{employeeCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, division_contract_flag = #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, department = #{department,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administrative_office = #{administrativeOffice,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, team = #{team,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, station = #{station,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_account = #{bankAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post_skill_salary = #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, target_performance_pay = #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, allocate_performance_pay = #{allocatePerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, wages_payable_post = #{wagesPayablePost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, wages_payable_float = #{wagesPayableFloat,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, wages_payable = #{wagesPayable,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, overtime_pay = #{overtimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, net_payment_post = #{netPaymentPost,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, net_payment_float = #{netPaymentFloat,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduction_amount = #{deductionAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, net_payment = #{netPayment,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, one_child_subsidy = #{oneChildSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, safety_accumulation_award = #{safetyAccumulationAward,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, seniority_allowance = #{seniorityAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, high_temperature_subsidy = #{highTemperatureSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, transportation_allowance = #{transportationAllowance,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, post_subsidy = #{postSubsidy,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, allowance_deduction = #{allowanceDeduction,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_medical_costs = #{deductMedicalCosts,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_other = #{deductOther,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center = #{costCenter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cost_center_num = #{costCenterNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, production_factor = #{productionFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, quality_factor = #{qualityFactor,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, assessment_coefficient = #{assessmentCoefficient,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, service_department = #{serviceDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{personalDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deduct_accumulation_fund = #{companyDeductAccumulationFund,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_hydropower_house = #{deductHydropowerHouse,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, deduct_income_tax = #{deductIncomeTax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, personal_deductibles = #{personalDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, company_deductibles = #{companyDeductibles,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, id_number = #{idNumber, jdbcType = VARCHAR},
sub_base_pay = #{subBasePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, sub_post_skill_salary = #{subPostSkillSalary, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, sub_lump_sum_wage = #{subLumpSumWage, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, deduct_other_before = #{deductOtherBefore, jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT left(swsf.income_period,4) as income_period, swsf.work_card, swsf.name, sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) as wages_payable_post, sum(swsf.net_payment_post) as net_payment_post,sum(swsf.wages_payable_float) as wages_payable_float, sum(swsf.net_payment_float) as net_payment_float,sum(swsf.wages_payable) as wages_payable, sum(swsf.net_payment) as net_payment FROM v_salary_summary swsf WHERE swsf.work_card like #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by swsf.work_card,left(swsf.income_period,4),swsf.name ORDER BY left(swsf.income_period,4) desc

select swsf.income_period, swsf.work_card, swsf.name, swsf.department, swsf.administrative_office, isnull(swsf.post_skill_salary, 0.00) as post_skill_salary, isnull(swsf.target_performance_pay, 0.00) as target_performance_pay, isnull(swsf.allocate_performance_pay, 0.00) as allocate_performance_pay, isnull(swsf.wages_payable, 0.00) as wages_payable, isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0.00) as overtime_pay, isnull(swsf.deduction_amount, 0.00) as deduction_amount, isnull(swsf.net_payment, 0.00) as net_payment, isnull(swsf.one_child_subsidy, 0.00) as one_child_subsidy, isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0.00) as safety_accumulation_award, isnull(swsf.seniority_allowance, 0.00) as seniority_allowance , isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0.00) as high_temperature_subsidy,isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance, 0.00) as transportation_allowance, isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0.00) as post_subsidy, isnull(swsf.allowance_deduction, 0.00) as allowance_deduction,isnull(swsf.deduct_medical_costs, 0.00) as deduct_medical_costs, isnull(swsf.deduct_other, 0.00) as deduct_other, isnull(swsf.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, 0.00) as personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, isnull(swsf.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, 0.00) as company_deduct_accumulation_fund , isnull(swsf.deduct_hydropower_house, 0.00) as deduct_hydropower_house, isnull(swsf.deduct_income_tax, 0.00) as deduct_income_tax , isnull(swsf.personal_deductibles, 0.00) as personal_deductibles ,isnull( swsf.company_deductibles, 0.00) as company_deductibles from v_salary_summary swsf where swsf.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by swsf.department, swsf.administrative_office, swsf.work_card

select temp.income_period, se.cost_center_num, se.cost_center, se.service_department, count(se.name) as count_name, sum(temp.one_child_subsidy) as count_one_child_subsidy, sum(temp.safety_accumulation_award) as count_safety_accumulation_award, sum(temp.seniority_allowance) as count_seniority_allowance, sum(temp.high_temperature_subsidy) as count_high_temperature_subsidy, sum(temp.transportation_allowance) as count_transportation_allowance, sum(temp.overtime_pay) as count_overtime_pay, sum(temp.allowance_deduction) as count_allowance_deduction, sum(temp.wages_payable) as count_wages_payable, sum(temp.deduct_medical_costs) as count_deduct_medical_costs, sum(temp.deduct_hydropower_house) as count_deduct_hydropower_house, sum(temp.deduct_income_tax) as count_deduct_income_tax, sum(temp.personal_deductibles) as count_personal_deductibles, sum(temp.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund) as count_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, sum(temp.deduct_other) as count_deduct_other, sum(temp.net_payment) as count_net_payment, sum(temp.post_subsidy) as count_post_subsidy from v_salary_summary temp join swm_employee se on temp.work_card = se.work_card and se.work_flag = 1
and temp.income_period = #{criteria.incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and temp.income_period = CAST(YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 1, GETDATE())) AS char(4)) + '.' + RIGHT('0' + RTRIM(CONVERT(char(2), MONTH(DATEADD(month, - 1, GETDATE())))), 2)
group by temp.income_period,se.cost_center, se.cost_center_num, se.service_department
union select '总计' as income_period, 'orderForSum' as cost_center_num, '' as cost_center, '' as service_department, count(se.name) as count_name, sum(temp.one_child_subsidy) as count_one_child_subsidy, sum(temp.safety_accumulation_award) as count_safety_accumulation_award, sum(temp.seniority_allowance) as count_seniority_allowance, sum(temp.high_temperature_subsidy) as count_high_temperature_subsidy, sum(temp.transportation_allowance) as count_transportation_allowance, sum(temp.overtime_pay) as count_overtime_pay, sum(temp.allowance_deduction) as count_allowance_deduction, sum(temp.wages_payable) as count_wages_payable, sum(temp.deduct_medical_costs) as count_deduct_medical_costs, sum(temp.deduct_hydropower_house) as count_deduct_hydropower_house, sum(temp.deduct_income_tax) as count_deduct_income_tax, sum(temp.personal_deductibles) as count_personal_deductibles, sum(temp.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund) as count_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, sum(temp.deduct_other) as count_deduct_other, sum(temp.net_payment) as count_net_payment, sum(temp.post_subsidy) as count_post_subsidy from v_salary_summary temp join swm_employee se on temp.work_card = se.work_card and se.work_flag = 1
and temp.income_period = #{criteria.incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and temp.income_period = CAST(YEAR(DATEADD(month, - 1, GETDATE())) AS char(4)) + '.' + RIGHT('0' + RTRIM(CONVERT(char(2), MONTH(DATEADD(month, - 1, GETDATE())))), 2)
order by se.cost_center_num
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_wage_summary_file (income_period, work_card, name, employee_category, division_contract_flag, department, administrative_office, team, station, bank_account, bank_name, post_skill_salary, target_performance_pay, allocate_performance_pay, wages_payable_post, wages_payable_float, wages_payable, overtime_pay, net_payment_post, net_payment_float, deduction_amount, net_payment, one_child_subsidy, safety_accumulation_award, seniority_allowance, high_temperature_subsidy, transportation_allowance, post_subsidy, allowance_deduction, deduct_medical_costs, deduct_other, type, cost_center, cost_center_num, production_factor, quality_factor, assessment_coefficient, service_department, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, company_deduct_accumulation_fund, deduct_hydropower_house, deduct_income_tax, personal_deductibles, company_deductibles, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, id_number, sub_lump_sum_wage, sub_base_pay,sub_post_skill_salary, deduct_other_before ) select temp.income_period, temp.work_card, temp.employee_name, temp.employee_category,temp.division_contract_flag, temp.department, temp.administrative_office, temp.team, temp.station, temp.bank_account, temp.bank_name, temp.post_skill_salary, temp.target_performance_pay, temp.allocate_performance_pay, temp.wages_payable_post, temp.wages_payable_float, temp.wages_payable, temp.overtime_pay, temp.net_payment_post, temp.net_payment_float, temp.deduction_amount, temp.net_payment, temp.one_child_subsidy, temp.safety_accumulation_award, temp.seniority_allowance, temp.high_temperature_subsidy, temp.transportation_allowance, temp.post_subsidy, temp.allowance_deduction, temp.deduct_medical_costs, temp.deduct_other, temp.type, temp.cost_center, temp.cost_center_num, temp.production_factor, temp.quality_factor, temp.assessment_coefficient, temp.service_department, temp.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, temp.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, temp.deduct_hydropower_house, temp.deduct_income_tax , temp.personal_deductibles, temp.company_deductibles, getdate(), -1, getdate(), -1, (select isnull(pe.id_number, '') from pm_employee pe join swm_employee se on pe.id = se.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and se.work_flag = 1 and se.work_card = temp.work_card), temp.sub_lump_sum_wage, temp.sub_base_pay, temp.sub_post_skill_salary, temp.deduct_other_before from (SELECT TOP (100) PERCENT dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.income_period, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.work_card, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.employee_name, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.division_contract_flag, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.department, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.administrative_office, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.bank_account, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.bank_name, round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.wages_payable, 2) AS wages_payable_post, ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_floating_wage.wages_payable, 2), 0) AS wages_payable_float, ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.wages_payable, 2), 0) + ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_floating_wage.wages_payable, 2), 0) AS wages_payable, isnull(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.overtime_pay, 2), 0) + isnull(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.holiday_overtime_pay, 2), 0) + isnull(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.rest_overtime_pay, 2), 0) as overtime_pay
, ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.net_payment, 2), 0) AS net_payment_post, ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_floating_wage.net_payment, 2), 0) AS net_payment_float, ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.wages_payable, 2), 0) + ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_floating_wage.wages_payable, 2), 0) - ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.net_payment, 2), 0) - ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_floating_wage.net_payment, 2), 0) AS deduction_amount, ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.net_payment, 2), 0) + ISNULL(round(dbo.swm_floating_wage.net_payment, 2), 0) AS net_payment, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.one_child_subsidy, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.safety_accumulation_award, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.seniority_allowance, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.high_temperature_subsidy, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.allowance_deduction + ISNULL(dbo.swm_floating_wage.pre_tax_withheld, 0) AS allowance_deduction, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.deduct_medical_costs, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.deduct_hydropower_house, ISNULL(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.deduct_income_tax, 0) AS deduct_income_tax, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.personal_deductibles, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.deduct_other - ISNULL(dbo.swm_floating_wage.after_tax_withheld, 0) AS deduct_other, ISNULL(dbo.swm_employee.type, 'B') AS type, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.cost_center_num, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.cost_center, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.team, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.station, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.employee_category, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.post_skill_salary, isnull(dbo.swm_floating_wage.target_performance_pay, 0) as target_performance_pay,ISNULL(dbo.swm_floating_wage.monthly_performance_salary, 0) AS monthly_performance_salary, ISNULL(dbo.swm_floating_wage.allocate_performance_pay, 0) AS allocate_performance_pay, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.post_subsidy, dbo.swm_floating_wage.production_factor, dbo.swm_floating_wage.quality_factor, dbo.swm_floating_wage.assessment_coefficient, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.company_deductibles, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.service_department, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.company_deduct_accumulation_fund, dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.transportation_allowance, dbo.swm_employee.lump_sum_wage as sub_lump_sum_wage, dbo.swm_employee.base_pay as sub_base_pay, case when dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.station = '保安班长' or dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.station = '保安队长' or dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.station = '保安员' or dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.station = '驾驶员' then dbo.swm_employee.post_skill_salary + dbo.swm_employee.base_pay else dbo.swm_employee.post_skill_salary end as sub_post_skill_salary, ISNULL(dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.deduct_other, 0) as deduct_other_before FROM dbo.swm_employee JOIN dbo.swm_post_skill_salary ON dbo.swm_employee.work_card = dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.work_card and dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.frozen_flag = 1 and dbo.swm_post_skill_salary.enabled_flag = 1 LEFT JOIN dbo.swm_floating_wage ON dbo.swm_employee.work_card = dbo.swm_floating_wage.work_card AND dbo.swm_floating_wage.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and dbo.swm_floating_wage.frozen_flag = 1 and dbo.swm_floating_wage.enabled_flag = 1 ) as temp where temp.income_period not in (select distinct swsf.income_period from swm_wage_summary_file swsf)
